description: FortiGate Security Dashboard - comprehensive visibility into Fortinet firewall traffic, security events, and device health. Covers accept/deny posture, top talkers, protocol breakdown, interface roles, and policy analysis.

graphs.title: FortiGate Security Overview
graphs.markdown: Real-time visibility into Fortinet firewall posture. All panels query `dataSource.name='FortiGate'`.

graphs.title: Total Firewall Events
graphs.query: dataSource.name='FortiGate' | group ct=count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Blocked / Denied Events
graphs.query: dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action in ('deny','blocked') | group ct=count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Accepted Events
graphs.query: dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action='accept' | group ct=count() | limit 1

graphs.title: SSL / Security Findings
graphs.query: dataSource.name='FortiGate' class_name='Security Finding' | group ct=count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Event Volume Over Time by Log Subtype
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' metadata.log_name=*
| group ct=count() by timestamp=timebucket('1h'), metadata.log_name
| transpose metadata.log_name on timestamp

graphs.title: Firewall Action Distribution (Accept / Deny / Blocked)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action=*
| group ct=count() by unmapped.action
| sort -ct

graphs.title: Events by FortiGate Device
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' device.name=*
| group ct=count() by device.name

graphs.title: Events by Severity Level
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.level=*
| group ct=count() by unmapped.level

graphs.title: Deny/Blocked Events Over Time by Device
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action in ('deny','blocked') device.name=*
| group ct=count() by timestamp=timebucket('1h'), device.name
| transpose device.name on timestamp

graphs.title: Traffic Analysis
graphs.markdown: Bandwidth consumption, protocol breakdown, top talkers, and application visibility.

graphs.title: Total Bytes Received (Inbound)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' traffic.bytes_in=*
| group total=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in))
| limit 1

graphs.title: Total Bytes Sent (Outbound)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' traffic.bytes_out=*
| group total=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out))
| limit 1

graphs.title: Total Packets In
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' traffic.packets_in=*
| group total=sum(number(traffic.packets_in))
| limit 1

graphs.title: Total Packets Out
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' traffic.packets_out=*
| group total=sum(number(traffic.packets_out))
| limit 1

graphs.title: Bandwidth Over Time (Bytes In vs Out per Hour)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate'
| group bytes_in=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in)), bytes_out=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out)) by timestamp=timebucket('1h')

graphs.title: Traffic by Protocol (TCP / UDP / Other)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' connection_info.protocol_num=*
| let proto = connection_info.protocol_num='6' ? 'TCP' : connection_info.protocol_num='17' ? 'UDP' : connection_info.protocol_num='1' ? 'ICMP' : 'Other'
| group ct=count() by proto
| sort -ct

graphs.title: Top 20 Source IPs by Egress Volume
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' src_endpoint.ip=*
| group bytes_in=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in)), bytes_out=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out)), sessions=count() by src_endpoint.ip
| sort -bytes_out
| limit 20

graphs.title: Top 20 Destination IPs by Ingress Volume
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' dst_endpoint.ip=*
| group bytes_in=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in)), bytes_out=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out)), sessions=count() by dst_endpoint.ip
| sort -bytes_in
| limit 20

graphs.title: Top 20 Destination Ports by Session Count
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' dst_endpoint.port=*
| group sessions=count(), bytes_in=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in)), bytes_out=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out)) by dst_endpoint.port
| sort -sessions
| limit 20

graphs.title: Top 20 Applications by Session Count
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' app_name=*
| group sessions=count() by app_name
| sort -sessions
| limit 20

graphs.title: Security Events
graphs.markdown: Denied and blocked traffic, SSL findings, and threat posture analysis.

graphs.title: Denied / Blocked Events Over Time (Hourly)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action in ('deny','blocked')
| group ct=count() by timestamp=timebucket('1h')

graphs.title: Warning-Level Events
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.level='warning'
| group ct=count()
| limit 1

graphs.title: Denied Traffic by Source Interface Role
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action in ('deny','blocked') unmapped.srcintfrole=*
| group ct=count() by unmapped.srcintfrole

graphs.title: Top 20 Denied Source IPs (Most Blocked Origins)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action in ('deny','blocked') src_endpoint.ip=*
| group ct=count() by src_endpoint.ip
| sort -ct
| limit 20

graphs.title: Top 20 Denied Destination IP:Port Pairs
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action in ('deny','blocked') dst_endpoint.ip=* dst_endpoint.port=*
| group ct=count() by dst_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.port
| sort -ct
| limit 20

graphs.title: SSL / Security Findings - Source to Destination
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' event.type='ssl'
| group ct=count() by src_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.port
| sort -ct
| limit 20

graphs.title: Deny Rate Posture
graphs.markdown:
A healthy firewall typically shows **> 90% accept** with deny/blocked concentrated on:
- **WAN to LAN** probes (expected internet noise)
- **Specific internal IPs** repeatedly hitting blocked destinations (possible misconfiguration or C2 attempt)

**Investigation triggers:**
- Deny rate > 20%: Check for scanning activity
- Single source IP > 500 denies: Possible compromised host
- Deny spike correlated with specific destination: Possible outbound C2

graphs.title: Device & Interface Analysis
graphs.markdown: Per-device breakdown, interface roles, NAT translation, and policy hit analysis.

graphs.title: FortiGate Device Summary (Events, Bytes In/Out)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' device.name=*
| group sessions=count(), bytes_in=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in)), bytes_out=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out)) by Device_Name=device.name, Device_ID=device.uid
| sort -sessions

graphs.title: Traffic by Source Interface
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' src_endpoint.interface_name=*
| group ct=count() by src_endpoint.interface_name
| sort -ct

graphs.title: Traffic by Destination Interface
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' dst_endpoint.interface_name=*
| group ct=count() by dst_endpoint.interface_name
| sort -ct

graphs.title: NAT Translation Disposition (SNAT / NOOP)
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.trandisp=*
| group ct=count() by unmapped.trandisp

graphs.title: Traffic Flow: Source Interface Role to Destination Interface Role
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.srcintfrole=* unmapped.dstintfrole=*
| group ct=count() by Source_Role=unmapped.srcintfrole, Dest_Role=unmapped.dstintfrole
| sort -ct
| limit 20

graphs.title: Top 20 Policy Type Hits
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.policytype=*
| group sessions=count() by Policy_Type=unmapped.policytype, Action=unmapped.action, Src_Interface=unmapped.srcintfrole, Dst_Interface=unmapped.dstintfrole
| sort -sessions
| limit 20

graphs.title: Session Duration Statistics by Device
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' device.name=* duration=*
| group avg_duration_sec=avg(number(duration)), max_duration_sec=max(number(duration)), total_sessions=count() by device.name

graphs.title: Top Destination Countries
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' dst_endpoint.location.country=*
| group ct=count() by dst_endpoint.location.country
| sort -ct
| limit 15

graphs.title: Top Source Countries
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' src_endpoint.location.country=*
| group ct=count() by src_endpoint.location.country
| sort -ct
| limit 15
